data.body:
Goal:
Implement the reviewed execution-plan initiative across Knots and Foolery so execution plans become first-class knots, Foolery persists plans in those knots, and generated work is linked back to its plan with provenance edges.

Verification:
1. In the Knots worktree, run the execution_plan-focused tests covering type parsing, builtin workflow registration, payload persistence/serialization, and CLI read/write surfaces; expect them to pass.
2. In the Foolery worktree, run the execution-plan API and orchestration-plan tests covering POST/GET/list/next/start/complete/fail flows against execution_plan knots; expect them to pass.
3. Use kno commands in Foolery to confirm a real execution_plan knot exists for spec:foolery/Specs/Spec - Grooming to Execution Plan.md and that generated work knots are linked to it with planned_by edges.

Constraints:
- Do the cross-repo implementation in dedicated git worktrees.
- Preserve the agreed execution_plan design: builtin workflow id execution_plan_sdlc, default autopilot profile with agent review, semiauto profile for human review, and planned_by edges from work knots to the plan knot.
- Do not use parent_of between an execution_plan knot and generated work knots.
data.title: Ship native execution_plan knots end to end
